input.title: Real Estate Listing Platform
input.description: Real Estate Listing Platform is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with Next.js and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Express, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Property Listing
requirements: Agents can list properties with details, photos, and video tours
Properties categorized by type (house, apartment, condo, land)
Set listing status (for sale, for rent, sold)
Virtual tour 360-degree photo support

FR-02.title: Property Search
requirements: Search by location, price range, bedrooms, and type
Map view showing property pins with price labels
Save searches with email alerts for new matches
Advanced filters: square footage, year built, amenities

FR-03.title: Property Detail Page
requirements: Photo gallery with fullscreen and slideshow
Property details: price, beds, baths, sqft, year, description
Floor plan viewer
Neighborhood info with nearby schools, transit, and amenities

FR-04.title: Mortgage Calculator
requirements: Calculate monthly payment based on price, down payment, rate, and term
Compare different loan scenarios side by side
Pre-qualification form for lender connection
Amortization schedule breakdown

FR-05.title: Agent Profiles
requirements: Agent profile with photo, bio, certifications, and listings
Client reviews and ratings for agents
Contact agent form with message
Agent activity statistics

FR-06.title: Scheduling Property Tours
requirements: Request tour with preferred dates and times
Agent confirms or suggests alternatives
Calendar integration for reminders
Virtual tour option via video call

FR-07.title: Saved Properties and Favorites
requirements: Save properties to favorites list
Compare up to 4 properties side by side
Price drop alerts for saved properties
Share properties via email or social media

FR-08.title: Lead Management for Agents
requirements: Track inquiries and interested buyers
Assign leads to pipeline stages
Follow-up reminders and task creation
Lead source tracking and analytics

FR-09.title: Document Management
requirements: Upload and store property documents (title, inspection, disclosure)
Document sharing with buyers and agents
E-signature integration for contracts
Document expiry tracking

FR-10.title: Market Analytics Dashboard
requirements: Average listing prices by neighborhood
Days on market trends
Price per square foot analysis
Market comparison reports

FR-11.title: Open House Management
requirements: Schedule open house events for listings
Public event page with RSVP
Visitor sign-in via mobile
Follow-up emails to attendees

FR-12.title: Rental Application
requirements: Online rental application form
Background and credit check integration
Application status tracking
Lease agreement e-signing

FR-13.title: Property Valuation Tool
requirements: Estimate property value using comparable sales
Adjust estimate based on condition and upgrades
Historical value trends for address
Request professional appraisal

FR-14.title: Notification System
requirements: New listing alerts matching saved searches
Price change notifications
Tour confirmation and reminder notifications
Offer and document notifications

FR-15.title: Admin Content Moderation
requirements: Review and approve new listings before publishing
Flag and remove inappropriate content
Verify agent credentials and licenses
Platform usage analytics

FR-01.title: Plan Property Listing Workflow and Contracts
FR-01.description: Review the SRS requirement bullets for property listing and break them into executable API, UI, data, security, and reporting subtasks. Define the workflow states, user roles, field-level validations, request/response contracts, and failure cases before implementation starts. Use these requirement drivers as the baseline: Agents can list properties with details, photos, and video tours; Properties categorized by type (house, apartment, condo, land); Set listing status (for sale, for rent, sold).
acceptance_criteria: The end-to-end workflow for property listing is documented from trigger to completion
Validation rules, role restrictions, and error scenarios for property listing are explicitly defined
Implementation subtasks for property listing can be picked up independently by engineering

FR-01.title: Implement Property Listing Backend Services
FR-01.description: Build the backend services for property listing on Next.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch. Create route handlers or service endpoints, model the core business operations, enforce validation and authorization rules, persist workflow state changes, and add structured error handling and audit logging. Make sure the implementation covers these behaviors: Agents can list properties with details, photos, and video tours; Properties categorized by type (house, apartment, condo, land); Set listing status (for sale, for rent, sold).
acceptance_criteria: Core property listing business rules are implemented for Real Estate Listing Platform
Validation, authorization, and error handling are covered for property listing
API/service behavior for property listing is testable and documented for integration

FR-01.title: Implement Property Listing Frontend Flow
FR-01.description: Build the frontend flow for property listing with the exact forms, tables, filters, wizards, status indicators, and action buttons required by the SRS. Connect the UI to the backend contract, handle optimistic updates or refresh flows where needed, and provide user-facing validation, permissions feedback, loading states, and recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: The property listing user flow is accessible and responsive across supported browsers
Forms, filters, tables, and feedback states for property listing behave correctly
The property listing UI is fully integrated with backend APIs and handles loading and error states

FR-01.title: Write Property Listing Automated and End-to-End Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests for property listing. Cover valid flows, invalid inputs, permission failures, state transitions, data integrity checks, and regression-prone edge cases pulled from the SRS. Add fixtures or mocks that make the feature verifiable in CI and local development.
acceptance_criteria: Happy path and failure cases for property listing are covered by automated tests
Permission checks and validation rules for property listing are verified
Regression coverage exists for the most critical property listing scenarios
